basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 19 Technicians, UDC and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bibinagar (AIIMS Bibinagar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bibinagar (AIIMS Bibinagar) Medical Superintendent & Administrative/Technical Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 06 April 2026 on the official website of aiimsbibinagar.edu.in. A total of 19 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 58 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Serving officers currently employed under Central/State Govt, UT, Autonomous Bodies, Universities, PSUs, R&D Organizations, Police Departments, Armed Forces/Para-Military Forces
qualification.details: Medical Superintendent: | A Medical qualification included in the I or II Schedule or Part-II of the Third Schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956 (persons possessing qualifications included in Part-II or Third Schedule should also fulfil the conditions specified in Section- 13(3) of the Act. A Postgraduate qualification, e.g. MD or MS or a recognized qualification equivalent thereto or M.H.A. (Masters in Hospital Administration) or a Post Graduate Degree recognized as equivalent to M.H.A. by the Medical Council of India. Experience: Ten years' experience in Hospital Administration in Hospitals after obtaining the P.G. Degree in a senior position, preferably in hospitals with 300 beds. | Financial Advisor: | Employees of the Central / State / Union Territory Governments / Universities / Central Statutory / Autonomous Bodies / Public Sector Undertakings / Research & Development organizations holding analogous post or With five years regular service from Organized Accounts Service in the grade pay of Rs. 7600 or Officers with Five years regular service at the level of Deputy Secretary of Central Government in the grade pay of Rs.7600 and having THREE years experience in the field of finance and accounts | Superintending Engineer: | Employees of the Central / State / Union Territory Governments / Universities / Central Statutory / Autonomous Bodies / Public Sector Undertakings / Research & Development organizations holding analogous post or Executive Engineers with 5 years of regular service in the grade pay ofRs. 7600. or Executive Engineer with 10 years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 6600. | Executive Engineer(Elect rical): | Employees of the Central / State / Union Territory Governments / Universities / Central Statutory / Autonomous Bodies / Public Sector Undertakings / Research & Development organizations holding analogous post or Assistant Engineer {Electric} with 5 years regular service in the grade payof Rs. 5400/ Junior Engineer (Electrical) with 7 years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 4600/ | Nursing Superintendent: | Officers of the State/Central Government of Statutory/Autonomous Bodies holding analogous posts. or Deputy/Assistant Nursing Superintendent with 5 years of regular service in the Grade pay of Rs.5400/- | Accounts Officer: | Officers under the Central/State/U.T. Governments/Universities/Statutory/Autonom ous Bodies or Research and Development Organizations holding analogous posts on regular basis, or II. Junior Accounts Officer with five years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 4200/- | Assistant Accounts Officer: | Officers under the Central/State/U.T. Governments/Universities/Statutory/Autonom ous Bodies or Research and Development Organizations holding analogous posts on regular basis, or Junior Accounts Officer with five years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 4200/- | Executive Assistant (N.S.): | Officers under the Central/State/U.T. Governments / Universities / Statutory, Autonomous Bodies or Research and Development Organizations. holding analogous posts on regular basis, or with 10 years regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 2400/- in the relevant field and possessing educational qualification for direct recruitment i.e., as under | Upper Division Clerk: | Officers under the Central/State/UT Governments/Universities/ Statutory/ Autonomous Bodies/ Research and Development Organizations or holding analogous posts on regular basis or With 8 years regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 1900/- and possessing educational qualification for direct recruitment i.e., as under Degree of recognized University or equivalent

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the AIIMS Bibinagar recruitment is 21 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for AIIMS Bibinagar posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 19 vacancies announced for various Administrative and Technical posts at AIIMS Bibinagar. These include positions like Medical Superintendent, Nursing Superintendent, and Technician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the AIIMS Bibinagar posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced under this recruitment is 58 years. This limit applies to candidates applying for any of the available positions.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the primary eligibility criterion for these posts?
faq.answer: The primary eligibility criterion is that candidates must be serving officers currently employed under Central/State Govt, UT, Autonomous Bodies, Universities, PSUs, R&D Organizations, Police Departments, Armed Forces/Para-Military Forces.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Medical Superintendent post?
faq.answer: The Medical Superintendent post offers a salary in Level-14, ranging from ₹1,44,200 to ₹2,18,200 per month, along with Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA).

faq.question: Q8. Which posts have the highest number of vacancies?
faq.answer: The Technician (Laboratory) post has the highest number of vacancies, with 5 positions available. Other posts like Nursing Superintendent and Assistant Accounts Officer have 2 vacancies each.

faq.question: Q9. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their service record, Annual Confidential Reports (ACRs)/Annual Performance Appraisal Reports (APARs), and Vigilance Clearance.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. You will find direct links to download these documents.
